forged.group: About Mom — Elizabeth "Beth" Cutter ✅ NAME CONFIRMED + SESSION 5 DETAIL
forged.text: **Beth's defining moment** — She needs a dedicated piece. Raw material now exists from Session 5. What's the ONE scene that captures her? The protector moment? The garden? The yard at 67?
**More match detail** — What did it feel like to beat Chad Wright specifically? Was Chuck there? What happened after? What happened to the four-peat plan — did the surgeries stop it?

fractured.text: **Gamifying surgery** — You said you had to gamify it. What were the tricks?
**The moment it shifted** — When did Fractured start becoming something else?

forging.text: **Were there others?** — Anyone else in the early Fielding days who mattered?
**The eulogy** — **SESSION 6: Shawn will try to get the eulogy he gave at Chuck's funeral.** This could be an incredible primary document — the words he chose at 31 about his father. WATCH FOR THIS.

foundry.text: **CVF in its prime** — Before the fracture. What was the good season? What did harvest look like when siblings were pulling together?
**What do you know now that you didn't know 5 years ago?** — Not about business. About yourself.

facts: Corrections batch:: Born 1979 | Fielding founded 2009, built 2009-2015, Quorum 2015-Dec 2018 | House = ranch style, ~4,000 sq ft, wide, surrounded by forest | Cessna 182 confirmed | Dave McCarty story REWRITTEN: went around Dave + maintained face, Dave making triple what anyone else made, Jeff Taton was CTO and frustrated by comp imbalance, restructured deal terms | Jeff Taton confirmed as CTO | "Twelve years" corrected to "six years" in Quorum bed piece

Dave McCarty deeper detail:: Dave was content with status quo because company was growing fast, had pipeline of customers, and had been GIVEN equity — if growth continued he'd make more money. Key learning: people who are given equity don't appreciate it the same way. Shawn made this mistake multiple times before wising up. Now handles equity differently at EnergiAcres — moved slower but avoids people who don't align with values. Dave was great at sales and Shawn learned a lot from him — Dave explained things, Shawn asked tons of questions, wanted to learn everything about sales, also saw his own mistakes.

Mom = Elizabeth "Beth" Cutter.: "Beth" in the original van story was Mom all along. Shawn says "she needs a place" in the book. | **TV channels:** ABC and NBC came in great, CBS was fuzzy, no Fox | **House layout:** Door next to garage on right side (concrete there), nobody used front door, office stuck out from house and overlooked everything — Chuck's chair was there | **Phone story FULL:** Portable phone, broke over his leg, business line nobody wanted to answer, Shawn handed bottom to Kristin — "you talk, I'll listen" — everyone died laughing | **Siblings CONFIRMED:** CJ (older brother), Shawna (HALF-SISTER, 18 months younger — dad cheated on mom), Kristin Cutter now Kristin Anthony (sister, 3 years younger, born ~1984). NO BETH — that was wrong, removed | **Van = Plymouth Voyager** (Plymouth version of Dodge Caravan) | **Wrestling tournament timing:** 3-4 months after accident (not "a year and change") — Jan/Feb 1991 | **CJ got 2nd place** that day, "usually would have been bad but he got it light" | **Fort:** Past the lawn, down over the hill, at the edge — could see the house but positioned so couldn't be seen | **Surgery specifics:** Latissimus dorsi from back + skin from right leg → put on top of foot. Had to go back weeks later to regraft large area of failed grafts | **Chuck at 175 date:** Corrected to ~1982 (born 1979, age 3)

Farm = Bechtel family heritage, Mom's side, same farm since Ohio was a state. Shawn is THERE right now (March 2026).: | **Pumpkins/gourds:** Gourds = couple hundred $ every fall (1.5-2 months work), pumpkins = $750 windfall, then learned Chuck made THOUSANDS off same pumpkins | **Shawna (S-H-A-W-N-A):** Found out 7th grade, pieced it together when she came back. Chuck paid lump sum child support. She'd only come by when needed something (car, something big). No real relationship. | **CJ:** Never close, but "the 2 boys." Team — "the Cutters outside." Knew CJ had his back. His 2 daughters don't have this dynamic; he brings it up because he wants to see it. | **200 head dairy cattle** + pigs & goats for fair (how much school could you miss). | **Amish fencing:** Built new barnyard fence, Amish family came. One price whole family. Kids didn't do much but had to be there. "Group price discount." | **Bedroom:** Shared w/ CJ. 2 double WATER BEDS, extra wavy. Liked it cold (carried through life). | **Steve Knight:** Grade school wrestling coach. Amazing. "Got into some stuff later on." | **Chad Wright:** West Salem (rival school). Shawn went to Chester. Same district. | **Everyone adapted** to injuries, not just coach. | **PRE-ACCIDENT 4TH GRADE: Fastest kid in the school.** Destined for sports. Accident fucked that up. | **Last normal day:** Planning pizza party. Rode bus home. Excited for McDonald's. | **Fair:** 3rd in division (steers), blue ribbon (zucchini). | **Fort:** Built around giant oak tree, corner of property, overlooked entire valley. Trip wires = kite string around saplings, perimeter detection. | **2 daughters** confirmed.

NEW SIBLING: Josh (younger brother).: Grew tall despite Chuck being 5'10"-5'11". "Lived on Doritos." | **Sports pre-accident:** Excelled at most sports, LOVED football, wanted to be Joe Montana. Would practice throwing + running to be faster. Only sucked at baseball — pretended to bunt, got hit by ball to get on base rather than swing. | **Chuck's height:** 5'10"-5'11" confirmed. | **Full sibling count now: CJ (older), Shawna (half-sister, 18mo younger), Kristin (3yr younger), Josh (younger).**

Chuck born 1956: (was 54 when he died, NOT 62 — corrected in bk1-three-thirty-am.md) | **CARINA spelled with a C** — all files corrected from "Karina" | **Met Carina at Miami** — she was friends with "townies" (Oxford, OH locals who grew up in cornfields). | **Handicap placard:** Carina thought he was a jerk using the placard. He was actually handicapped. "The scooter guy at college" — moped with weed eater motor. | **Parents hated elopement.** "Reception of swords" at Thanksgiving later that year. | **Moved to FL 2005.** Apartments until 2007. Plant City house 2009 (same year as Fielding). South Tampa end of 2015 (for schools). | **Gia born 2010** (32 hours labor). **Tessa born 2012.** | **"Didn't start sounding like Chuck until kids were 4 or 5."** Will come back to this. | **Josh younger brother** confirmed earlier in session.

CARINA BORN 7/8/1981.: Married 7/8/2006 — on her birthday. | **CHUCK'S DEATH MEDICAL:** Had stents in leg (blockage exacerbated by knee injuries). Combination of blood thinners + medication likely caused death. Doctor said "nope, can't be it, keep taking it" when Chuck knew something was wrong. "You need to listen to the doctors but make the decision for yourself." Died about 5:15 AM. | **CHUCK SOFTENING:** "Getting softer as he was getting older. I was really looking forward to him being a grandpa." | **MOM & DAD MET GIA MAY 2010.** Chuck had ~6 months with her before dying Nov 12. | **HOLDING GIA:** "I don't think that I felt the same intensity that I even feel right now." Emotional wall. Spent so much time in rational head. Only held her briefly — labor was terrible, baby stressed, tests, almost C-section. | **SELF-HARM:** "I cut myself a lot in high school so that I could control the pain. Still have scars on my arm." Plus scar from shattering left arm on 4-wheeler at 16. Compartmentalization. Doesn't think PTSD but "extreme traumatic events — you learn to turn things off." | **JEFF TATON:** Met at By Design Technologies (first FL job). Friends. Both love Tool. CTO at Fielding. Now at Terrasow. Spelling may be Taynton. | **MIKE HUFF** (NOT Hobbs): Jeff's best friend from school. 4th hire at Fielding. Both earned equity, life-changing money. | **LAST FLIGHT:** 2011, after Chuck's death. Was training for instrument rating. Moved to Ohio temporarily. Never got back up. Drones later. Wants jet eventually. "If a plane is going down, I will bring it down." Trained at Vandenberg/Tampa Exec AND Peter O'Knight. FL flying: Lakeland, Plant City, Fort Myers. | **QUORUM OFFER:** Joe Norris called. API question as qualifier. Tyson and Perry flew to Tampa. Dave flew down for diligence, then got weird/suspicious. | **FIRST DAYS AT QUORUM:** "Amazing but I didn't know what I didn't know. Wasted time talking to people who weren't going to get it." | **PHASE 2 LABS:** Investment LLC. Family/legacy vehicle. | **CHUCK'S FUNERAL:** Shawn spoke, CJ spoke, Butch Rogers (former accountant and pastor) spoke. | **ARIA ROOM:** High room. Quorum rented big chunk of event center. Need Wednesday date for official announcement.

ENERGIACRES ORIGIN:: Gradual buildup. Deep-learning about indoor hemp cultivation, what the Dutch were doing. Hit him sitting on the farm: "We have this gas, we have all this. What's holding us back from scaling? Deploy in energy co-ops." **Founded February 2022.** But kept quiet — couldn't start another company with all the others running. Had to structure it to operate solo for years. "EnergiAcres represents me — farming, energy, and technology together. A problem I can work on for the rest of my life, never solve, and be happy." Energy + acres, AI in the middle. Couple offers on first site as of March 2026. | **CEDAR VALLEY FAILURE:** Purpose was "get my mom to retirement." Build sustainable business, sell business and the farm. Mom won't sell main Bechtel farm but would part with others. **It didn't happen.** Broken business model. No sales. Didn't plan. Shawn personally funding it. "Family business + everyone's emotions = Shawn not funding it means turning against family." Learned how family does/doesn't operate. "Have to be here and in it or it doesn't work." | **GREENSCREENS** also a clusterfuck, burning cash simultaneously with Cedar Valley. Feb 2022 = "hardest and most painful time." | **THERAPY:** Couples therapy with Carina started 2023, "not in a good place." Pivoted when therapist said "this is Shawn's doing — real trauma issues." Got referral for individual. Friend **Andrew Palmer** hugely supportive — "so happy" Shawn was going. Said it would help relationships. "He's absolutely right. Him saying that kept me going." | **SELF-REFLECTION NOW DAILY:** "I'm analyzing what I'm feeling and thinking and why" — happens continually. Therapy working. | **GIA DOESN'T KNOW ABOUT THE BOOK.** Everyone knows about accident — "probably tired of hearing it" — used as cautionary tale for motorcycles, crossing roads, etc.

MOM (BETH):: "She's amazing. What she had to endure... eternal love in her heart." Protector from Chuck at times. Unconditional love. Puts others first to her own detriment. **Age 67** (March 2026), still blowing off the yard, takes care of her garden, works huge acreage. "She's done enough — it's time for the kids to step up." | **BEDROOM COMPLETE:** Door NW corner, CJ's bed by door/exit, Shawn's bed by window. Lighter stained pine water beds with headboards. Ferrari Testarossa model + SR-71 Blackbird replica on headboard. Model planes hobby. 4-drawer dresser at foot of bed. Tall TV stand grandpa built (19" TV, VCR), nearly to ceiling. Chest with "Rocky" on it — huge Rocky/Rambo/Schwarzenegger fan ("if it had something to do with killing the Russians"). Dark blue carpet. Textured ceiling. Screwdriver-in-socket incident (electricity jumped through insulated handle, hit funny bone). | **CJ FIGHTS:** 20-25 lbs smaller. Door slamming incident (pinned CJ between wall and door, doorknob hitting side). Pillowcase + empty shampoo bottle = knocked CJ out. Strategy: hit hard enough CJ can't get back up, then run. | **CJ GOOD MEMORIES:** Built forts together, worked together. | **FAIR AT NIGHT:** Fair food = vinegar fries with salt, steak burgers, pizza. Carney games when had money. Independence because had animal responsibilities. Tractor pull = "dad's thing" (had to sit through). Demolition derby = the real draw. Standing on trailers by fence (dad knew people). Always smelled like shit. Horse races pointless. | **FORT DESIGN:** Huge oak tree, boards screwed in as ladder + rope, first platform with floor around trunk, lookout area, "no girls allowed," inspired by Little Rascals (old show + movie). Built with CJ.

AI/SINGULARITY VISION:: "Plug myself into the internet." Virtual Shawn instances/doppelgangers. Lawnmower Man as touchstone influence. "AI is the next layer of human existence." Not theoretical — deeply personal. Wants to extend himself through AI. EnergiAcres = physical infrastructure layer → compute layer → AI layer. | **AI AS PERSONAL TOOL:** The book process = helping AI understand him → better self-awareness → better relationships. "Helping AI understand me" is really "helping me understand me." The meta-process is therapeutic — it's forcing articulation of things never articulated before. | **GREENSCREENS CURRENT STATE:** 0 full-time employees. ~250 locations live. Sustained since 2022 cuts. "6 people supporting 300 locations." Still running on skeleton crew. | **OPERATOR PHILOSOPHY:** "Cannot suffer fools." Needs operators who've run companies to the end. Can't build with inexperienced people — not elitism, survival. | **CEDAR VALLEY BREAKING MOMENT:** Team turns against him on calls. Refusing directives. The fracture had a specific inflection — calls turned hostile. People he was personally funding were refusing to follow direction. | **NEW IDEA — FAMILY RECORDINGS:** Wants to create questions for family members to record voice memos. Multiple viewpoints on same events. Beth, CJ, Carina, possibly others. Integrate their perspectives into the book.

EARLY SUCCESS TRAP:: Fielding → Quorum created false belief of continued success. "That's just not the way life works. It's much more cyclical." | **FOUNDER ENERGY:** "Only enough founder energy for one focus at a time. I had to learn that the hard way." | **PHASE 2 LABS MISTAKE:** Strategy was outsource/allocate across 3-4 projects ("they wouldn't need me every day"). Didn't set himself up for it. Should have studied other founders. "I had to learn while digging out of a hole. I wouldn't recommend doing that." | **THE SERIES A GAP:** Got acquired before Series A → went straight to Series D (Quorum). Never went through A→B→C→D founder progression. Missed organizational learning. "I didn't appreciate what was built. And that's on me." | **QUORUM HARD ASS:** Regrets being a hard ass — was at a different state of mind, hadn't proven himself yet. Once Quorum sold again → validation. | **QUORUM ~$1B EXIT:** "Close to a billion-dollar exit, and I helped do that." Major validation. | **COGNITIVE LAND + SASHA NELSON:** Best engineer, best person, smartest, "stretched me the most." Built Cognitive Land at Quorum — "what is now GPT." AI-first platform ingesting land/lease agreements, learning from user corrections, capturing tacit knowledge. "Pretty gnarly shit, we were bleeding edge." Quorum only gave him ONE resource. Sasha left over Quorum frustration. Shawn "really fucked up that relationship" getting busy with startups. "Should have spent time researching with Sasha — we would have found our way." | **DONNY KERR:** Replaced Sasha. Another amazing engineer. | **ROLE MODELS:** Jobs, Gates, Musk — studied deeply over the years.

COLLEGE TIMELINE:: Transferred to Miami from Akron in 1999. Graduated spring 2003. Five years total. Akron was wrong place — chemistry/biomed wrong major. Needed distance from house. | **87 STITCHES BREAKDOWN:** Rock by CJ (30-32), saw on left arm (13), broke right arm, stitches in chin, forehead, wrist. "A lot of accidents." | **FIRST STEPS:** Parents' bedroom, only room with TV. Sat on side of bed. "Brain told my legs to move, and it didn't happen, and I fell over." Couple months after crash. | **PASTOR AT 10:** Told him God doesn't exist, first hospital visit. "I don't think my pastor came to visit me after that." | **GRANDPA'S FUNERAL 2001:** Grandpa Cutter. Dad found out about nipple rings. Kept piercings (including tongue) hidden for over a year. | **ATV CRASH AT 17:** Ramping in pasture, shattered left arm, 5 pins and a plate. Had to come clean with parents. | **ACCIDENT MORNING:** Slightly cool, leaves turning, "perfect colorful fall days." CJ "went into sales mode" at the bus. 10-year-old on four-wheeler to get gas alone. | **THE LADY:** Found out who she was, doesn't know name. Insurance paid some bills. "Time stood still. Eyes connected. Then nothing." | **COURT:** 6 months after, Shawn testified. Insurance for bills. Parents didn't ask for more. | **DAD IN ER:** "Hands in his pockets. Looking down. Didn't say anything initially. Took it all in." Dad used to take stitches out at home. | **WAKING UP ICU:** Beeps. Couple days after. Thought it was a dream. Closed eyes, slept, woke again. "This is real." Called for nurse. Parents sent home — an hour away in Akron. "Stared at monitors, ceiling. Definitely cried. Got tears now." | **MOM AT HOSPITAL:** Stayed at Ronald McDonald House next door. Mom was there more. Dad took him to appointments. Shared effort. | **THE GAUZE:** Most painful thing ever. Only time passed out from pain. | **PLAYROOM:** Nintendo, ages 3-12. Bedridden kids not allowed. First time there — empty. | **THE DRANO BOY:** Shared room with small boy who drank Drano. Esophagus destroyed, had to replace it. "Bad shape." | **LAST SURGERIES:** Foot surgery 1999 (before Miami). Another 2009 — Achilles tendon lengthened + bone spur.

PHASE 2 LABS FULL DEFINITION:: Family office + venture studio. Invests in startups (his and others). Irrevocable trusts ownership. Legacy planning. Main company = EnergiAcres. | **VANTAGE MOVING:** Now providing guidance and feedback. "Very positive." 10X waiting on responses. | **ANDREW PALMER FULL PROFILE:** One of best friends. Mile down road. West Salem Elementary (rival school). Dad neighbors with Mom. Families go way back. Biggest kid in class. Nerd friend — both read a lot. Got Shawn into sci-fi. Built caves and forts. **Took Shawn to first Burning Man.** Cancer survivor (battled several times, won). Little girl he wasn't supposed to have. Lost touch — need to cultivate. | **THERAPY REACTION:** Not relief. "I think I've already dealt with these." Self-medicated, self-analyzed long before. Therapist helped talk through what he hadn't. "Feels amazing to have others validate." | **CEDAR VALLEY CALL SPECIFIC:** Fiefdom, "high school shit." Handwritten letters on every order — "This is not going to help." Being direct not enough. | **SINGULARITY→FARM CONNECTION:** Wells on farm, reusing energy, Fielding monitoring enhanced/recovery fields. "Circularity of energy." | **CHUCK + ENERGIACRES:** "He would totally get it. Not the data center side. But everything else." | **LAWNMOWER MAN SPECIFIC:** "Plugged me into the idea that the mind could be connected and networked with computer systems and the internet. That thread was never turned off." | **"SHAWN'S THE PROBLEM":** Was hearing it from everyone. In the end, wasn't the problem in the businesses — people doing shitty jobs, Shawn tells them directly. Some can't take that.
